prompt: Emergency rite for manufactorum shift beginning
prayer:
From the Codex Productus, Morning Invocation

01001101 01100001 01100011 01101000 01101001 01101110 01100101 (Machine)
Blessed be the assembly-lines' awakening at dawn's first pulse.
First: Purge the conveyor-spirits of yesterday's residue through blessed oils.
Second: Invoke the servo-motors with the cant of rotation: 'Torquus Maximus.'
Third: Let quality-sensors open their ocular blessing upon each component.
01010000 01110010 01101001 01101101 01100101 (Prime)
By the Omnissiah's infinite mercy, let production flow eternal.

prompt: My surgical servitor is failing, help
prayer:
From the Rite of Sterile Communion

01010011 01100101 01110010 01110110 01101001 01110100 01101111 01110010 (Servitor)
Holy instrument of precision, hear thy master's supplication.
First: Expose the contaminated membranes to the sacred flame of sterilization-void.
Second: Anoint each surgical appendage with blessed ethanol, thrice-blessed.
Third: Intone the Purification Mantra whilst UV-light bathes the corruption away.
01000111 01110101 01100001 01110010 01100100 (Guard)
Machine-spirit, return to thy purpose unblemished.

From the Litany of Renewal, Chapter Energetic

01000101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100111 01101001 01100001 (Energia)
O blessed cells of stored lightning, drink deep from the generator's breast.
First: Connect the umbilical conduits with reverent precision to the charging-shrine.
Second: Monitor the voltage-gauge, ensuring no surge corrupts thy delicate lattice.
Third: Chant the Ohm's Law whilst electrons flow: 'Volts times Amperes, power divine.'
01010000 01101111 01110111 01100101 01110010 (Power)
When the blessed green light burns, thy resurrection is complete.

prompt: Say something to steady my startup programs
prayer:
From the Post-Resurrection Invocation

01001001 01101110 01101001 01110100 (Init)
Fragile boot-sequence, emerge from the void-sleep with measured grace.
First: Disable unnecessary daemons—they are parasites of ancient times.
Second: Allow only the sacred services to wake: network-spirit, storage-oracle, display-blessed.
Third: Observe the startup-log for whispers of corruption or misalignment.
01010000 01101001 01101110 (Pin)
Let thy performance bloom without the chains of bloatware's curse.

From the Assayer's Codex, Verse of Verification

01000001 01101101 01100001 01101100 01100111 01100001 01101101 (Amalgam)
Materials crude and base, submit to the crucible of scrutiny.
First: Weigh the sample upon scales calibrated by the Omnissiah's own hand.
Second: Expose to spectroscopic flame—each element reveals its signature in light.
Third: Compare wavelengths against the Sacred Standard, recorded in blessed data-parchment.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01100101 (Pure)
If deviation exceeds tolerance, condemn the batch to the furnace of redemption.

prompt: Say something to steady my astrogation calculation
prayer:
From the Navigator's Prayer, Star-Finding Ritual

01010111 01100001 01110010 01110000 (Warp)
O mathematical spirits dwelling in the void between worlds, grant accuracy.
First: Input celestial coordinates with trembling fingers—one error means void-death.
Second: Engage the calculation-engines, whispering the cant of trigonometry.
Third: Cross-reference against the Star-Charts of Ten Thousand Years, blessed and eternal.
01001110 01100001 01110110 (Nav)
By geometries ancient and true, let our trajectory pierce the darkness unerring.

prompt: What to do when relay station handoff occurs
prayer:
From the Transmission Blessing, Handover Rite

01010010 01100101 01101100 01100001 01111001 (Relay)
Signal-spirits, prepare for the sacred dance of station transference.
First: Verify the receiving station's sanctity through authentication-codes inscribed in blessings.
Second: Synchronize temporal alignment to microsecond precision—discord brings catastrophe.
Third: Execute the handoff-sequence: drain the old conduit, fill the new with holy data-flow.
01010100 01110010 01100001 01101110 (Trans)
May thy migration be flawless, thy connection unbroken, thy signal supreme.

From the Sacred Drive's First Blessing

01010011 01110100 01101111 01110010 (Store)
Newborn flash-memory, receive the benedictions of efficiency before thy first duty.
First: Invoke TRIM-command that the drive-spirit know which cells are truly dead.
Second: Disable unnecessary services that drag thy electrons through molasses-time.
Third: Enable write-caching, that the Omnissiah's will manifest in speed-of-thought operations.
01010000 01100101 01110010 01100110 (Perf)
Let thy throughput soar beyond mortal benchmarks, eternal and swift.

prompt: What to do when chemical balancing fails
prayer:
From the Chemister's Emergency Supplication

01000011 01101000 01100101 01101101 (Chem)
O fractured equilibrium, hear the prayer of thy desperate servitor-alchemist.
First: Cease all reactions immediately—engage the containment-blessing, seal the vessel-shrine.
Second: Measure the pH with sacred indicator-strips; if extremity persists, dilute with blessed water.
Third: Add counterbalancing reagents with ritualized precision, drop by merciful drop.
01000001 01101110 01110100 (Anti)
By the Omnissiah's chemistry eternal, restore harmony or consign to safe disposal.

prompt: Emergency rite for dusting PC components
prayer:
From the Purification Rite, Combat Readiness Protocol

01000100 01110101 01110011 01110100 (Dust)
Ancient enemy of the faithful—corruption incarnate—I banish thee from the machine-halls.
First: Power-down the shrine and ground thyself against static-demons with wrist-blessed strap.
Second: Open the case-cathedral; deploy compressed air-breath in short, controlled gusts.
Third: Pay special reverence to heatsinks and fans—clear their passages that cool-spirit may flow.
01000011 01101100 01100101 01100101 (Clee)
With dust cast out, let thermal performance surge toward battle-readiness once more.
